title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at PwC India

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at PwC India
jsonLd.description:
PwC India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Faridabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About PwC India:
PwC India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PwC India!
